onu.name: ${onu\-name}
onu.root:
<#if pluggable\-optical\-electrical\-SFP?has_content && pluggable\-optical\-electrical\-SFP== true >
25G_cage nokia-hwi:cage-uni CHASSIS 1
25G_transceiver bbf-hwt:transceiver 25G_cage 0
</#if>
<#if eth\-port\-hw\-option == "rj45" > PORT_${eth\-port\-hw\-option}_${eth\-port\-hw\-number} bbf-hwt:rj45 CHASSIS ${eth\-port\-hw\-number} unlocked </#if> <#if eth\-port\-hw\-option == "rj45-1G" > PORT_${eth\-port\-hw\-option}_${eth\-port\-hw\-number} nokia-hwi:rj45-1G CHASSIS ${eth\-port\-hw\-number} unlocked </#if> <#if eth\-port\-hw\-option == "rj45-5G" > PORT_${eth\-port\-hw\-option}_${eth\-port\-hw\-number} nokia-hwi:rj45-5G CHASSIS ${eth\-port\-hw\-number} unlocked </#if> <#if eth\-port\-hw\-option == "rj45-10-100M" > PORT_${eth\-port\-hw\-option}_${eth\-port\-hw\-number} nokia-hwi:rj45-10-100M CHASSIS ${eth\-port\-hw\-number} unlocked </#if> <#if eth\-port\-hw\-option == "rj45-25G" > PORT_${eth\-port\-hw\-option}_${eth\-port\-hw\-number} nokia-hwi:rj45-25G CHASSIS ${eth\-port\-hw\-number} unlocked </#if> <#if eth\-port\-hw\-option == "rj45-2.5G" > PORT_${eth\-port\-hw\-option}_${eth\-port\-hw\-number} nokia-hwi:rj45-2.5G CHASSIS ${eth\-port\-hw\-number} unlocked </#if> <#if eth\-port\-hw\-option == "rj45-10G" > PORT_${eth\-port\-hw\-option}_${eth\-port\-hw\-number} nokia-hwi:rj45-10G CHASSIS ${eth\-port\-hw\-number} unlocked </#if> <#if eth\-port\-hw\-option == "rj45-40G" > PORT_${eth\-port\-hw\-option}_${eth\-port\-hw\-number} nokia-hwi:rj45-40G CHASSIS ${eth\-port\-hw\-number} unlocked </#if> <#if eth\-port\-hw\-option == "rf-video" > PORT_${eth\-port\-hw\-option}_${eth\-port\-hw\-number} nokia-hwi:rf-video CHASSIS ${eth\-port\-hw\-number} </#if> <#if special\-integrated\-ONUs?has_content && special\-integrated\-ONUs== true > PORT_${eth\-port\-hw\-option}_${eth\-port\-hw\-number} bbf-hwt:rj45 CHASSIS unlocked </#if> <#if virtual\-board\-number?has_content>
${virtual\-board\-number} <#if port\-id?has_content > ${port\-id} </#if>
</#if> <#if power\-over\-ethernet\-control?has_content && power\-over\-ethernet\-control == true >
true 0 high
</#if> <#if power\-over\-ethernet\-control?has_content && power\-over\-ethernet\-control != true >
false
</#if> <#if eth\-port\-hw\-option == "veip" > VEIPPORT${eth\-port\-hw\-number} CHASSIS ${eth\-port\-hw\-number} nokia-hwi:virtual-port </#if> <#if eth\-port\-hw\-option == "moca" > MOCAPORT${eth\-port\-hw\-number} CHASSIS ${eth\-port\-hw\-number} nokia-hwi:moca </#if> <#if pluggable\-optical\-electrical\-SFP?has_content && pluggable\-optical\-electrical\-SFP== true > PORT_${eth\-port\-hw\-option}_${eth\-port\-hw\-number} 25G_transceiver ${eth\-port\-hw\-number} bbf-hwt:transceiver-link </#if>
${enet\-name} <#if eth\-port\-hw\-option == "veip" > bbf-xponift:onu-v-vrefpoint true VEIPPORT${eth\-port\-hw\-number}
<#if ani\-name?has_content> ${ani\-name} </#if>
<#elseif eth\-port\-hw\-option == "rf-video" > nokia-if-id:rf-video-ani true PORT_${eth\-port\-hw\-option}_${eth\-port\-hw\-number} <#elseif eth\-port\-hw\-option == "moca" > nokia-if-id:moca-uni true MOCAPORT${eth\-port\-hw\-number} <#if moca\-mode?has_content && moca\-mode == "moca">
<#if moca\-password?has_content> ${moca\-password} </#if>
</#if> <#if moca\-mode?has_content && moca\-mode == "moca-access">
<#if moca\-password?has_content> ${moca\-password} </#if>
</#if> <#else> ianaift:ethernetCsmacd true PORT_${eth\-port\-hw\-option}_${eth\-port\-hw\-number}
enabled <#if pluggable\-optical\-electrical\-SFP?has_content && pluggable\-optical\-electrical\-SFP== true && fec?has_content > ${fec} </#if>
</#if> <#if disable\-upon\-ponlos?has_content> ${disable\-upon\-ponlos} </#if>
<#if (gemport\-sharing?has_content && gemport\-sharing == true) >
<#if tc0\-tcont\-name?has_content>
${enet\-name}-GEM0 ${enet\-name} 0 ${tc0\-tcont\-name} <#if tc0\-gemport\-id?has_content> ${tc0\-gemport\-id} </#if> <#if upstream\-aes?has_content> ${upstream\-aes} </#if> <#if downstream\-aes?has_content> ${downstream\-aes} </#if>
</#if> <#if tc1\-tcont\-name?has_content>
${enet\-name}-GEM1 ${enet\-name} 1 ${tc1\-tcont\-name} <#if tc1\-gemport\-id?has_content> ${tc1\-gemport\-id} </#if> <#if upstream\-aes?has_content> ${upstream\-aes} </#if> <#if downstream\-aes?has_content> ${downstream\-aes} </#if>
</#if> <#if tc2\-tcont\-name?has_content>
${enet\-name}-GEM2 ${enet\-name} 2 ${tc2\-tcont\-name} <#if tc2\-gemport\-id?has_content> ${tc2\-gemport\-id} </#if> <#if upstream\-aes?has_content> ${upstream\-aes} </#if> <#if downstream\-aes?has_content> ${downstream\-aes} </#if>
</#if> <#if tc3\-tcont\-name?has_content>
${enet\-name}-GEM3 ${enet\-name} 3 ${tc3\-tcont\-name} <#if tc3\-gemport\-id?has_content> ${tc3\-gemport\-id} </#if> <#if upstream\-aes?has_content> ${upstream\-aes} </#if> <#if downstream\-aes?has_content> ${downstream\-aes} </#if>
</#if> <#if tc4\-tcont\-name?has_content>
${enet\-name}-GEM4 ${enet\-name} 4 ${tc4\-tcont\-name} <#if tc4\-gemport\-id?has_content> ${tc4\-gemport\-id} </#if> <#if upstream\-aes?has_content> ${upstream\-aes} </#if> <#if downstream\-aes?has_content> ${downstream\-aes} </#if>
</#if> <#if tc5\-tcont\-name?has_content>
${enet\-name}-GEM5 ${enet\-name} 5 ${tc5\-tcont\-name} <#if tc5\-gemport\-id?has_content> ${tc5\-gemport\-id} </#if> <#if upstream\-aes?has_content> ${upstream\-aes} </#if> <#if downstream\-aes?has_content> ${downstream\-aes} </#if>
</#if> <#if tc6\-tcont\-name?has_content>
${enet\-name}-GEM6 ${enet\-name} 6 ${tc6\-tcont\-name} <#if tc6\-gemport\-id?has_content> ${tc6\-gemport\-id} </#if> <#if upstream\-aes?has_content> ${upstream\-aes} </#if> <#if downstream\-aes?has_content> ${downstream\-aes} </#if>
</#if> <#if tc7\-tcont\-name?has_content>
${enet\-name}-GEM7 ${enet\-name} 7 ${tc7\-tcont\-name} <#if tc7\-gemport\-id?has_content> ${tc7\-gemport\-id} </#if> <#if upstream\-aes?has_content> ${upstream\-aes} </#if> <#if downstream\-aes?has_content> ${downstream\-aes} </#if>
</#if>
</#if>
